meta.title: 8 weapons the US can launch from RAPID DRAGON
meta.description:
Go to https://ground.news/Sandboxx to stay fully informed on military developments around the world. Subscribe through my link right now for 40% off their Vantage Plan, which is what I use everyday.

– BREAK –

America’s new plan for air warfare is simple: flood the enemy with so many targets — weapons, jammers, aircraft, and more — that their air defenses simply can’t keep up. But across the vast expanses of the Pacific… this is much easier said than done. 

Let's talk about the 8 weapons that could make this possible using the Air Force's Rapid Dragon palletized launch system.
